column1: # Sample Dataset 5: Edge Case - Zero Cases
# Teaching Example - Handling zero cases in dose categories
# Use For: Teaching continuity correction and data cleaning
# Scenario: Rare disease with some dose categories having zero events
# This is a COMMON real-world problem!
# Add 0.5 to ALL cases in all categories:
#   1. Add 0.5 (or other small value) to ALL categories
#   2. Not just the zeros - must be consistent
#   3. Alternative: exclude dose categories with zero cases
#   4. Document the correction in your methods section
# Remove entire dose categories with zero cases:
# Use exact Poisson regression instead of delta method
# Requires specialized software (not in Dose Response Pro)
# 1. Load original data - should error on log(0)
# 3. Compare results with and without correction
# 4. Discuss which approach is more appropriate
